add_params.name: CreatePolicies
add_params.description: Array of policy objects to create: [{Name: string, RetentionPolicyTagLinks: string[]}]. Sent when isEdit=false.

add_params.name: ModifyPolicies
add_params.description: Array of policy modification objects: [{Identity: string, Name: string, RetentionPolicyTagLinks: string[]}]. Sent when isEdit=true.

add_params.name: DeletePolicies
add_params.description: Array of policy identity strings to delete. Not sent by this form but accepted by PS1.

notes: customDataformatter wraps the form fields into either CreatePolicies or ModifyPolicies array based on whether isEdit is true. RetentionPolicyTagLinks is extracted from autocomplete objects to string values. For edit: ModifyPolicies[0] = {Identity: name (from router), Name: values.Name, RetentionPolicyTagLinks: string[]}. For add: CreatePolicies[0] = {Name: values.Name, RetentionPolicyTagLinks: string[]}. PS1 reads these arrays directly.
x_cipp_warnings: customDataformatter is present on the CippFormPage for this endpoint. Form field names and/or types may be renamed or restructured before POST. Verify the transformer function in the frontend page file and correct param names/types accordingly.
